description: At the end of a shift, the operations supervisor needs to generate a report summarizing the day's activities.

nodes.task_description: Access the reporting module in the TOS.

expected_outcome.value: Supervisor logs into the reporting system.

nodes.task_description: Run the 'Daily Operations Summary' report for the specified date.

expected_outcome.value: The system queries the database for all operational data for that day.

nodes.task_description: Review the report (e.g., total moves, vessels handled, truck turn time) and email it to the terminal management team.

expected_outcome.value: The supervisor reviews the KPIs and distributes the report to stakeholders.
